query:
UPDATE posts SET 
  topic = CASE 
    WHEN LOWER(CONCAT(title, body)) REGEXP 'justice|racism|inequality|oppression|prophetic|witness|culture|social|border|refugee|gentrification|reparation' THEN 'justice'
    WHEN LOWER(CONCAT(title, body)) REGEXP 'leadership|pastor|leader|vision|governance|team|authority|shepherd|calling' THEN 'leadership'
    WHEN LOWER(CONCAT(title, body)) REGEXP 'prayer|spiritual|formation|discipline|contemplation|faith|transformation|growth|soul' THEN 'spiritual-formation'
    WHEN LOWER(CONCAT(title, body)) REGEXP 'church|health|unity|body|fellowship|community|gathering|worship' THEN 'church-health'
    WHEN LOWER(CONCAT(title, body)) REGEXP 'marriage|family|parenting|personal|individual|self|development|mental' THEN 'personal-growth'
    WHEN LOWER(CONCAT(title, body)) REGEXP 'care|counseling|grief|suffering|pain|comfort|compassion|listening' THEN 'pastoral-care'
    ELSE 'justice'
  END,
  audience = CASE 
    WHEN LOWER(CONCAT(title, body)) REGEXP 'pastor|ministry|pulpit|preaching' THEN 'pastors'
    WHEN LOWER(CONCAT(title, body)) REGEXP 'leader|leadership|elder|deacon|governance' THEN 'church-leaders'
    WHEN LOWER(CONCAT(title, body)) REGEXP 'group|community|gathering|discussion' THEN 'small-groups'
    WHEN LOWER(CONCAT(title, body)) REGEXP 'marriage|couple|spouse|husband|wife' THEN 'couples'
    ELSE 'individuals'
  END,
  difficulty = CASE 
    WHEN (LENGTH(body) - LENGTH(REPLACE(body, ' ', '')) + 1) < 500 THEN 'beginner'
    WHEN (LENGTH(body) - LENGTH(REPLACE(body, ' ', '')) + 1) > 2000 THEN 'advanced'
    ELSE 'intermediate'
  END,
  readingTimeMinutes = GREATEST(3, CEIL((LENGTH(body) - LENGTH(REPLACE(body, ' ', '')) + 1) / 200))
WHERE published = true;
